'''chabungu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nibbles|nibbles]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-b-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nibbles|nibbles]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| chabungu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:chæbingith|chæbingith]] || [[word:chæbingij|chæbingij]] || [[word:chæbingish|chæbingish]] || [[word:chæbingi|chæbingi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:chabubunguth|chabubunguth]] || [[word:chabubunguj|chabubunguj]] || [[word:chabubungush|chabubungush]] || [[word:chabubungu|chabubungu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:chabunguth|chabunguth]] || [[word:chabunguj|chabunguj]] || [[word:chabungush|chabungush]] || [[word:chabungu|chabungu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:chabufnguth|chabufnguth]] || [[word:chabufnguj|chabufnguj]] || [[word:chabufngush|chabufngush]] || [[word:chabufnguf|chabufnguf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chabunguthu|chabunguthu]] || [[word:chabunguju|chabunguju]] || [[word:chabungushu|chabungushu]] || [[word:chabunguku|chabunguku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chabunguth|chabunguth]] || [[word:chabunguj|chabunguj]] || [[word:chabungush|chabungush]] || [[word:chabungu|chabungu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chabunguthul|chabunguthul]] || [[word:chabungujul|chabungujul]] || [[word:chabungushul|chabungushul]] || [[word:chabungukul|chabungukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chabunguthuthu|chabunguthuthu]] || [[word:chabungujuju|chabungujuju]] || [[word:chabungushushu|chabungushushu]] || [[word:chabunguku|chabunguku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chabunguthun|chabunguthun]] || [[word:chabungujun|chabungujun]] || [[word:chabungushun|chabungushun]] || [[word:chabungukun|chabungukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chabunguthuoro|chabunguthuoro]] || [[word:chabungujuoro|chabungujuoro]] || [[word:chabungushuoro|chabungushuoro]] || [[word:chabungukuoro|chabungukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|654f723}}
